_comment: Last-known-good benchmark numbers. Populated by .github/workflows/benchmarks-nightly.yml after its first successful run with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + OPENAI_API_KEY + HF_TOKEN secrets configured. Until then the nightly gate is a no-op (first-run exception documented in the workflow). Any subsequent nightly run with recall@10 regressing by more than MNEMO_BENCH_REGRESSION_PP (default 3.0) percentage points vs the values here will fail the job.
